hooks.command: PROMPT=$(jq -r '.prompt'); REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; agent-kg ingest "$PROMPT" --role user --repo "$REPO_ROOT" 2>/dev/null || true
MSG=$(jq -r '.last_assistant_message // empty'); REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; [ -n "$MSG" ] && agent-kg ingest "$MSG" --role assistant --repo "$REPO_ROOT" 2>/dev/null || true
